rationale: This live-action UGC dance hook has almost no overlap with Marble Sort!'s calm, pastel, gameplay-driven DNA — the dim room and muted earth-tone palette directly clash with the soft lavender/orange satisfying aesthetic, and a young male dancer skews away from the 25-55 female casual-puzzle audience. The hook also shows zero gameplay, so it fails to communicate the physics-tap sorting loop that drives installs in this genre. Hard pass unless reworked with a female creator showing actual sorting gameplay and a "satisfying/relaxing" emotional angle rather than hype-energy.
